title: UNSTABLE Merge Blocker — promote RULE-CI-UNSTABLE-GATES-IDENTICALLY-RED-1 to automated
description: Implements .github/workflows/pr-mergeability-check.yml — GHA workflow blocking PR merge when mergeStateStatus = UNSTABLE unless override-unstable-merge label is applied by Erik (L4). Promotes RULE-CI-UNSTABLE-GATES-IDENTICALLY-RED-1 from activeTier human-loop to activeTier automated. First rule promotion via canonical mechanism — proves the maturity ladder works as designed. Closes FU-RULE-CI-UNSTABLE-AUTOMATED-WORKFLOW-1 (P1). Closes the loop on PR #48 + PR #269 incident pattern.

outputs.description: Substrate read report — mergeStateStatus timing behavior verified before workflow authoring.
acceptanceCriteria: mergeStateStatus queryable via gh pr view on open PRs
Field values characterized: UNKNOWN (merged/async), CLEAN, UNSTABLE observed
Async transition UNSTABLE → CLEAN observed in Step 2 (~2s apart); retry loop confirmed required
Workflow design decision made: 3-attempt retry with 5s sleep

outputs.description: .github/workflows/pr-mergeability-check.yml — blocks squash-merge when mergeStateStatus = UNSTABLE unless override-unstable-merge label present.
acceptanceCriteria: Triggers on pull_request events (opened, synchronize, reopened, labeled, unlabeled)
Queries PR mergeStateStatus via gh pr view --json with 3-attempt retry loop
Fails check when mergeStateStatus = UNSTABLE and override-unstable-merge label absent
Passes with warning annotation when label present
Workflow passes on this PR (substrate is clean)

transitions.trigger: Dispatch authored after FU-D-1 close (7b7df70). P1 priority. Closes PR #48 + #269 incident loop. First rule promotion via canonical mechanism.

notes: First rule promotion in the foundation arc's post-completion FU block. Promotes RULE-CI-UNSTABLE-GATES-IDENTICALLY-RED-1 via canonical mechanism: append transition, update tierState, bump rule instance version. The transition carries evidenceClass citing the workflow's own existence. Pattern proven here will be reused for subsequent rule promotions. Scope per rule's exact statement: UNSTABLE only; BLOCKED/DIRTY/BEHIND are out of scope for this deliverable. Step 2 substrate read confirmed mergeStateStatus async behavior — UNSTABLE→CLEAN transition observed within ~2s on PR #65; retry loop required.
